text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what Tome and the other folks 
from back home are doing right now…

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice if I could give them 
some good news soon.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: …Trainer, do you ever miss your hometown?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If you do, please let me know.
